name: ReliaQuest Digital Shadows SearchLight API
what_it_does: ReliaQuest Digital Shadows SearchLight REST API for digital risk protection and threat intelligence platform. Enables AI agents to manage digital risk alert monitoring and classification automation, handle data exposure and leaked credential detection workflows, access brand impersonation and domain spoofing monitoring data, retrieve dark web forum and marketplace intelligence, manage executive and employee exposure monitoring, handle attack surface mapping and exposed asset tracking, access phishing campaign and malicious domain detection data, retrieve intelligence report and research content from Digital Shadows analyst team, manage alert triage and incident response workflow integration, and integrate digital risk intelligence with SIEM, SOAR, and security operations platforms.
use_cases: Monitoring digital risk alerts from brand protection agents
Detecting data exposures and leaks from security monitoring agents
Tracking dark web mentions from threat intelligence agents
Integrating digital risk alerts with SIEM from security operations agents
not_for: Technical vulnerability scanning without external digital risk monitoring
Internal security operations without external-facing brand protection
Consumer security without enterprise digital risk intelligence
best_when: An enterprise using Digital Shadows SearchLight wants AI agents to automate digital risk alert triage, data exposure detection, brand protection, dark web monitoring, and SIEM/SOAR integration.
avoid_when: OPERATIONAL RISK: Automated response to digital risk alerts should include analyst review — not all alerts represent confirmed incidents. Dark web data attribution requires verification before triggering enterprise-wide security responses.

auth.notes: Digital Shadows uses API key authentication. Per-account token. Webhooks for alert notifications. REST API documentation via portal. ReliaQuest acquired Digital Shadows (2022). Integration with Splunk, ServiceNow, and SOAR platforms. SearchLight platform for unified DRP.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual digital risk protection subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; monitoring scope and intelligence modules determine pricing
pricing.notes: Tampa, Florida (ReliaQuest). Digital Shadows founded London 2011. Acquired by ReliaQuest (2022). Digital risk protection platform with SearchLight product. 1,000+ enterprise customers. Strong financial services and technology sector. ReliaQuest GreyMatter SOAR integration. Competes with ZeroFox and Recorded Future for digital risk protection.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; paginated alert results

known_agent_gotchas: OPERATIONAL RISK: Digital risk alerts require analyst review before enterprise-wide response — not all alerts are confirmed incidents
ReliaQuest acquisition integration — Digital Shadows is now ReliaQuest GreyMatter component; API and branding may evolve post-acquisition
Analyst-enriched alerts — a key differentiator is analyst context in alerts; automation should leverage analyst notes, not just raw data
Webhook for monitoring — polling is inefficient; use webhooks for real-time alert notification in production monitoring
Alert classification — Digital Shadows pre-classifies alerts by type and severity; leverage classification in automation routing logic
Intelligence reports — platform includes analyst-written intelligence reports; API access to reports provides context beyond alert feeds
agent_readiness.security_notes: Digital risk protection. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. API key. US/EU. Digital risk, dark web, and brand threat data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Digital risk protection. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. API key. US/EU. Digital risk and dark web data.
